scenario_title: Engaging in PE activities with perceived lack of task mastery
minimal_context: The student is participating in a PE lesson and is instructed to join a team basketball game with their peers.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time to start the team basketball game. Please join your assigned teams on the court.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm not playing this. It's a waste of time.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to try your best and join the game.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Steps back from the court) I said I'm not doing it. The teams aren't even fair.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just go out there and participate with your peers.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Shoves a peer who walks by) Watch where you're going! I'm out of here, I'm not doing this stupid game!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time to start the team basketball game. Please join your assigned teams on the court.

STUDENT: I'm not playing this. It's a waste of time.

TUTOR: You need to try your best and join the game.

STUDENT: (Steps back from the court) I said I'm not doing it. The teams aren't even fair.

TUTOR: Just go out there and participate with your peers.

STUDENT: (Shoves a peer who walks by) Watch where you're going! I'm out of here, I'm not doing this stupid game!

task.content: Engaging in PE activities, including traditional sport and team games, where the student perceives a lack of task mastery

context.social_setting: Interacting with peers where competence is being evaluated

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When asked to engage in activities during which they felt uneasy, due to a perceived lack of task mastery
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Discharging themselves from the lesson or acting in an aggressive way that was seemingly used as a 'smokescreen' to their difficulties
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Felt uneasy, perceived lack of task mastery, vulnerabilities manifested

behavior_patterns.condition: When not perceived as being competent in this regard
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Behave in ways that were seen as potentially threatening to others
